results.query: Summarise the latest status for Nexus Payments Ltd

body.answer:
**Nexus Payments Ltd** — Segment: Mid-Market | Account health: red

Open issues (3):
• [CRITICAL] ISO 20022 pacs.008 rejection rate at 12% following SWIFT cutover (#6)
• [HIGH] PSD2 Open Banking API returning HTTP 429 errors to three regulated TPPs (#7)
• [HIGH] Chargeback reconciliation lag: 2,400 unmatched transactions pending over 72 hours (#8)

Latest update on #6 (2026-06-24, compliance.lead): "All 6 affected BICs identified. 4 have confirmed migration timelines within 30 days. 2 have not responded to outreach. Legal team drafting contractual compliance notices to non-responsive correspondents."

Escalation risk: **Critical** — urgency: immediate. Nexus Payments Ltd has 3 open issue(s). Highest severity: Critical. Account health: red.

Risk rationale: Critical-severity issue present; account health is red (critical account); 3 open issues unresolved.

Information gaps: Issue owner not assigned.

output.title: ISO 20022 pacs.008 rejection rate at 12% following SWIFT cutover
PSD2 Open Banking API returning HTTP 429 errors to three regulated TPPs
Chargeback reconciliation lag: 2,400 unmatched transactions pending over 72 hours

output.update_text: Rejection rate climbed from 3% on go-live day to 12% by day 3. Total 1,847 pacs.008 payments rejected by correspondent banks. Primary reason: BIC11 validation failing for 6 respondent banks not yet migrated to ISO 20022.
SWIFT service desk ticket raised (ref SWIFT-2024-00341). Interim workaround agreed: affected payments re-routed via legacy MT103 pathway. Note: this fallback pathway closes in March 2025.

All 6 affected BICs identified. 4 have confirmed migration timelines within 30 days. 2 have not responded to outreach. Legal team drafting contractual compliance notices to non-responsive correspondents.

output.executive_summary: Nexus Payments Ltd has 3 open issue(s). Highest severity: Critical. Account health: red.
output.risk_rationale: Critical-severity issue present; account health is red (critical account); 3 open issues unresolved
output.recommended_next_action: Escalate to account executive immediately. Validate customer impact within 2 hours, assign dedicated owner, and send a status update to the customer.
output.owner_suggestion: Escalate to account executive and support manager immediately.

output.title: FIX drop-copy session disconnects causing unreported trades at market open

output.update_text: Drop-copy session to Euronext experiencing TCP resets at 08:00:03 CET each morning since Monday. Approximately 340 trades per session going unreported to the CCP, triggering a T+1 reporting obligation breach.

Network team identified MTU mismatch (1500 vs 1480) between clearing gateway and co-location switch following last week's firewall firmware upgrade. MTU alignment fix applied in co-lo at 14:00 CET. Session monitoring active.
Session remained stable for 4 hours post-fix then recurred at market close 17:30 CET. Packet captures collected and sent to Euronext network engineering for joint root-cause analysis.

output.action_text: Validate mapping rules, confirm impact, and send customer update by end of next business day.

output.executive_summary: Apex Clearing Services has 1 open issue(s). Highest severity: Critical. Account health: red.
output.risk_rationale: Critical-severity issue present; account health is red (critical account)
output.recommended_next_action: Escalate to account executive immediately. Validate customer impact within 2 hours, assign dedicated owner, and send a status update to the customer.
output.owner_suggestion: Escalate to account executive and support manager immediately.

body.answer:
issues across all clients — 15 total

**Apex Clearing Services** (2 issues):
  • [CRITICAL] [open] FIX drop-copy session disconnects causing unreported trades at market open
  • [HIGH] [in_progress] Margin call mismatch vs prime broker: USD 2.3M variance on GBP-STRAT-004

**Atlas Merchant Bank** (1 issue):
  • [HIGH] [open] KYC periodic review overdue: 180 corporate accounts beyond 12-month refresh cycle

**Fortuna Wealth Management** (2 issues):
  • [HIGH] [open] MiFID II transaction reporting: 340 equity trades late-filed to FCA via ARM
  • [MEDIUM] [open] Client portal P99 latency degraded to 8.2s against 2s contractual SLA

**Meridian Capital Group** (2 issues):
  • [HIGH] [open] T+2 settlement reconciliation breaks on multi-leg equity structured trades
  • [MEDIUM] [in_progress] IBOR-to-SOFR: residual GBP LIBOR references in 12 institutional fund fact sheets

**Nexus Payments Ltd** (3 issues):
  • [CRITICAL] [open] ISO 20022 pacs.008 rejection rate at 12% following SWIFT cutover
  • [HIGH] [open] PSD2 Open Banking API returning HTTP 429 errors to three regulated TPPs
  • [HIGH] [open] Chargeback reconciliation lag: 2,400 unmatched transactions pending over 72 hours

**Pinnacle Bancorp** (3 issues):
  • [CRITICAL] [open] Core banking EOD batch failure: GL balance posting incomplete
  • [HIGH] [open] Mobile banking 504 timeouts during morning peak 09:00-11:00 GMT
  • [HIGH] [open] AML screening queue backlog breaching 4-hour SLA threshold

**Sterling Asset Management** (2 issues):
  • [HIGH] [in_progress] Bloomberg B-PIPE feed drops causing NAV calculation delays on 3 funds
  • [MEDIUM] [open] SFDR PAI report missing 4 mandatory Level 2 indicators: deadline risk
